## Checklist

- [ ] AI-assisted output is limited to this PR's scope.
- [ ] Tests or manual checks cover the generated behavior.
- [ ] Non-obvious generated logic is explained.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private data are included.
- [ ] No large unexplained generated files are included.
- [ ] CI passes.
